title: Simple Health Indicator
description: A simple health indicator shown over player's heads!
body:
# Simple Health Indicator (SHI)

## Info

A very simple health indicator.  This client-side mod adds a very simple health indicator so you can see the health of another player.

To use this mod, download the mod it and move it to your ```.minecraft/mods``` folder.

This mod is configurable if you use [ShadowHunter22's Config Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/shadowhunter22s-config-library/). 

## Features

- Very simple: a health indicator shown near the player's name!
- To toggle the indicator's visibility, press `H`.

## Dependencies

- [Optional] ShadowHunter22's Config Library
- [Optional] Mod Menu

## Versions

This mod is **Fabric** ONLY.  There is no plan to support Forge.

This mod is available for the following Minecraft versions:

`1.20.x`

`1.21.x`

`26.1`
`26.1.1`
`26.1.2`
`26.2`

## Server Support

This mod does not need to be added to the server.  This is a client-side only mod.

## Compatibility with Servers and Clients

This mod is known to have issues with certain clients and servers.  Most of the time, it is out of my control to fix these issues.  This mod has known issues with the following clients and servers:

### Clients

- FeatherMC (***only** if you use the `Top` position in the config menu*)
- Lunar Client (_does not work at all_)

### Servers

- PvP Legacy
- Majority of PvP servers
